/home/runner/work/keepassxc/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++  -fno-common -fopenmp -Wall -Wextra -Wundef -Wpointer-arith -Wno-long-long -Wformat=2 -Wmissing-format-attribute -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fstack-protector-strong -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wold-style-cast -Woverloaded-virtual -U_FORTIFY_SOURCE -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Werror=format-security -Wcast-align -fsized-deallocation -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -pie -fPIE -pie -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/testkeepass2randomstream.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/testkeepass2randomstream.dir/testkeepass2randomstream_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testkeepass2randomstream.dir/TestKeePass2RandomStream.cpp.o -o testkeepass2randomstream  ../src/libkeepassx_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Test.so.5.15.13 ../src/libautotype.a ../src/qrcode/libqrcode.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libqrencode.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Concurrent.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbotan-2.so ../src/thirdparty/zxcvbn/libzxcvbn.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libminizip.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libargon2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5DBus.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5X11Extras.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 -lX11 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
